Metadata.title: Reps
Metadata.description: 24/7 gym downtown. Full weights, turf, group classes.

Hero.headline: Train hard. Recover harder.
Hero.subheadline: Full weights floor, turf zone, and group classes. No contract. Walk in anytime.

access24.title: 24/7 access
access24.description: Early morning, late night, doesn't matter. Swipe in whenever. Members get key fob access round the clock.

weightsFloor.title: Full weights floor
weightsFloor.description: Squat racks, benches, dumbbells up to 120. Deadlift platform. Turf for sled work and carries.

groupClasses.title: Group classes
groupClasses.description: HIIT, strength, and mobility sessions are included in membership. Book your spot in the app.

recoveryZone.title: Recovery zone
recoveryZone.description: Stretching area, mobility tools, and post-session space to cool down properly after training.

CTA.title: First visit free.
CTA.description: Drop by for a tour. No pressure. We'll get you set up if you want to join.

validation.usernameMin: Username must be at least 2 characters
validation.usernameInvalid: Username can only contain letters, numbers, underscores and hyphens
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

membership.fullAccess: Full access to weights floor, turf zone, and group classes

membership.choosePlanDescription: Pick one of the three plans and activate it from the payment card.
membership.detailsDescription: Memberships include gym access plus up to three active class enrollments.
membership.paymentDescription: Simulated checkout with field validation. No real payment is processed.
membership.paymentNote: Use any valid-looking test card details. This updates the membership in the app after validation succeeds.

Pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits. No hidden fees.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: This page explains how information is handled inside the gym management demo and sets expectations for an academic prototype rather than a live service.
privacy.disclaimer: This application was created as a bachelor’s degree project and is presented strictly as a demo. It is not a production gym platform, it is not intended for real customer onboarding, and it should not be relied on as a legally complete privacy implementation.
privacy.summaryBody: The project demonstrates authentication, memberships, classes, and admin workflows for academic review. Any records shown in the app exist to support the demo experience.

sections.title: Information shown in the demo
sections.body: The app may display member names, usernames, membership selections, class bookings, visit counts, and similar operational data so the full product flow can be evaluated.
points: Demo member accounts and seeded records are used to illustrate the system behavior.
Membership changes and class enrollments are stored to simulate realistic workflows.
The payment card UI validates inputs but does not process real financial transactions.

sections.title: Purpose of the data
sections.body: Any information stored in this project is used only to demonstrate technical functionality, interface design, and backend behavior as part of the academic deliverable.
points: The project is intended for coursework, technical review, and demonstration.
It is not intended for marketing, profiling, or commercial customer management.
It exists to show the implementation of CRUD flows, authentication, memberships, and scheduling.

sections.title: Non-production limitations
sections.body: This demo should not be interpreted as a final privacy compliance solution for a commercial application.
points: Policies, retention rules, and consent flows would require a separate production review.
The content on this page is explanatory and demo-oriented.
Any real deployment would need proper legal, compliance, and security work before use.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.description: These terms describe the limited intended use of the demo and clarify that the application is an academic prototype, not a live membership service.
terms.disclaimer: This gym management platform is a bachelor’s degree project demo. It is provided for presentation, testing, and evaluation only. It does not create real memberships, real payment obligations, or binding service terms.
terms.summaryBody: You may explore the application to review features and implementation quality, but the system should be treated entirely as a demonstration environment.

sections.title: Permitted use
sections.body: The demo may be used to navigate the interface, create test accounts, review admin and member workflows, and evaluate the application for academic or technical purposes.
points: You may interact with memberships, classes, and seeded data as part of the demo.
You may inspect the implementation for coursework or engineering review.
You should treat all actions and results as simulated behavior.

sections.title: No commercial reliance
sections.body: Nothing in the application should be interpreted as a real-world contract, subscription, or payment commitment.
points: The payment interface is a simulation with validation only.
Membership activation inside the app does not create a legal agreement.
The project should not be used as a substitute for operational or legal documentation.

sections.title: Availability and changes
sections.body: Because the project is a demo under development, data and behavior may change at any time without notice.
points: Seeded accounts and records may be reset during testing.
Features may be modified as part of ongoing refinement.
Any production deployment would require separate legal, operational, and security review.
